name: Date Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Dates (stoned but not cut up)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates, walnuts, and cherries in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the sugar to the flour mixture and mix well.
4. Beat 4 egg yolks until thick and incorporate into the cake mixture.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff and dry.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
8. Line two loaf pans with wax paper.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
10. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
